ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region characteristics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the income group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_types" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income group */,
  "family_members" INTEGER /* Number of family members */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the household head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_income_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_group_id") REFERENCES income_groups ("income_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic group of the household */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the household head */,
  "geo_region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the household */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group categorizing the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of energy source usage */,
  "total_expenditure" TEXT /* Total expenditure on the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_source_types ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_metadata" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the survey */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES survey_metadata ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role in the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions */,
  "activity_history" TEXT /* User activity history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry accessed */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES survey_metadata ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the report version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the report version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES survey_metadata ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic entry */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_answers_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)
